info.description: This is a Go API server for Expense Management.
info.title: Expense Management API

post.description: Submit email to receive a password reset token (token is printed to server console logs for development).
Verify Google ID Token and register or login user, linking to email/password if email matches.
Authenticate user with email and password and return a JWT token.
Revoke/invalidate the refresh token, logging out the user from the current session.
Provide a valid refresh token to get a new access token and a rotated refresh token.
Create a new user account with email, password, and display name, or link to an existing Google account.
Submit email, reset token, and new password to complete password reset.

get.description: Get a list of all active categories (system categories + custom categories belonging to the user).

post.description: Create a new custom category for the logged-in user.

put.description: Update the details of an existing category. System categories only allow modifying activation status and ordering.

delete.description: Deactivate (hide) a category from the user. It is not physically deleted to prevent breaking links of existing transaction records.

get.description: Get detailed profile information of the current logged-in user.

put.description: Update profile details like display name and preferred currency code.

post.description: Upload an image file to set as the user's profile avatar.

get.description: Get a list of all transactions belonging to the logged-in user, optionally filtered by wallet ID.

post.description: Create a transaction (EXPENSE, INCOME, or TRANSFER) and automatically update wallet balance(s).

put.description: Update transaction details. Reverts the old balance adjustments and applies new adjustments in a single transaction.

delete.description: Delete a transaction and automatically revert the wallet balance adjustment.

get.description: Get a list of all active wallets belonging to the logged-in user.

post.description: Create a new wallet for the logged-in user.

put.description: Update the details of an existing wallet.

delete.description: Soft delete a wallet if there are no transactions associated with it.

patch.description: Toggle the is_favorite flag for a specific wallet and unmark other wallets.

BearerAuth.description: Type "Bearer " followed by your JWT token.
BearerAuth.name: Authorization
